title: Combining Notifications and Inbox
excerpt: Idea: Combine the Notifications Bell and the Monday.com Inbox into one Notifications Center. This is based on the feedback I have received from our Team of Monday users. It would be much easier and streamlined for our Sa…

posts.author: MThornton (Micah Thornton)
posts.cookedHtml: Idea: Combine the Notifications Bell and the Monday.com Inbox into one Notifications Center. This is based on the feedback I have received from our Team of Monday users. It would be much easier and streamlined for our Sales staff to be able to go one place for all notifications and updates.
